textByHash.6786729d5eb29e3710aa2931b8c1392041620e1d: Yes? Do you have business with one of the prisoners?
textByHash.75684758c91e8b365c18c7e5c1a210d4e0f3ed8e: : Because she hasn't said a word since she arrived.
textByHash.7c887cf5f8016575fc892ff8e1380b3365d2b083: They will be if they're found guilty.
textByHash.b9115e0c2194734f31a87b9ab23003339ad934a0: : Adventurer. If you're here to speak with our newest guest, I wouldn't waste your time.
textByHash.e45ae339f867f1387ea3158d938303f90e36cebd: Does it matter? They are criminals.
